question_text: Two springs are tested with the same force applied to each. Spring A stretches by 2 cm and Spring B stretches by 4 cm. Which statement is correct?

options.label: A
options.text: Spring A is stiffer because it stretches less

options.label: B
options.text: Spring B is stiffer because it stretches more

options.label: C
options.text: Both springs have the same spring constant

options.label: D
options.text: Spring A is easier to stretch than Spring B

explanation: A stiffer spring has a larger spring constant and stretches less under the same force. Since Spring A stretches only 2 cm compared to Spring B's 4 cm with the same force applied, Spring A must have a higher spring constant and be stiffer.
